betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The horde of the Meatball Man. I have taken it.
The magic of Hungering Flesh. I have become one with it.
The power of the Meatball Man, part of it was spread between his lieutenants. Lieutenants I have defeated.
Their powers are now in my hands. In my True Name, the guide to do so.
The Sentient Meatballs, I hold power over them. If I wanted to, I could end them. Forever. I could end the existance of Sentient Meatballs. I could return them to their base state, of undead not unlike the creatures that unveiled my True Name.
This, the changing of my Name, is something the Meatball Man did not predict. The acts of some of his servants, who defied his will, who held to secret knowledge, they are ultimately responsible for this.
And now, they walk in my shadow. Bearing witness to what will happen next.
